commitResults.messageTitle: Update site-wide settings and README for CoursePilot
commitResults.messageBody:
- Rename AB-3 to CoursePilot in _config.yml, _base.scss, and README
- Update CI badge to point to team repo
- Update project description and product website link
- Acknowledge AB3 origin

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commitResults.messageTitle: Update Developer Guide with CoursePilot requirements
commitResults.messageBody:
- Update target user profile and value proposition for tutors/TAs
- Add user stories for student management, attendance, and grading
- Add use cases: add student, delete student, mark attendance, record grade
- Update non-functional requirements with project constraints
- Expand glossary with domain-specific terms

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
